resources.string: Ka jingshit jingkhriat %1$s ka la hiar sha ka pud jong ngi kaba %2$s
Jingmaham: Da kaba pyntreikam ia ka opshon ba la kdew haneng ka lah ban pynduh ia ka battery jong phi kham kloi ban ia kaba ju long
U nongjied rong ba shadien jong ka Widget
Ki rong ba la shna kyrpang
Jingjied: URL ba la shna kyrpang
Ka URL ba la buh kyrpang kam shym la set, lane ka long kaba thylli. Phi lah ban leit sha ki jingpynbeit ban pyndap ia ka URL ba kyrpang
Ka %1$s URL ka long kaba thylli, sngewbha peit ia ka %2$s file jong phi bad pyrshang biang
Pyndam lut ia baroh ki Data bad khang noh
Ka jingbakla ka la jia haba pyrshang ban pynthymmai ia ka jingpyndonkam
La lah ban pyniasoh ia ka %1$s data bad ka %2$s data
La lah ban pyntreikam ia ki jingtip ba la antad
La lah ban pyntreikam hok ia ki jingtip jong ka jinglong ka suinbneng na ka server jong phi, khamtam eh ia ki jingtip jong ka %1$s
U nongjied rong ba shakhmat jong ka Widget
Ka jait jingkhein lypa \'%1$s\' ka long kaba bakla, peit ia ka file jong ki jingpynbeit jong phi bad pyrshang biang
Ka URL jong ka jingkhein lypa kam shym la buh, buh ia ka ha %1$s
Pyni ia ki jingpule hapoh iing?

Kane ka app lah dep pynthymmai tangba ka server kaba phi connect kam pat lah ban pynthymmai ia ka Inigo Plugin na ka bynta ka weeWX. Ki field ki lah ban ym paw bha tad haduh ban da pynthymmai ia ka weeWX
Ka jingpynthymmai kam long kaba biang, pynthymmai ia ki jingpynbeit bad nangta pyrshang biang

Ka %1$s mynta ka donkam ia ka %2$s data file na ka %3$s server, phi donkam ban pynthymmai ia ka %4$s bad pynthymmai ia ka %5$s file shwa ba kane ka app kan treikam bha. Nion Ok na ka bynta ki jingtip ba kham bniah ha ka %6$s
Ki jingkhein jingdiah jong u bnai ba la dep
Ka jingkhein jingdiah jong u snem ba la dep
Pynthymmai da ka kti, swipe pynthymmai ia ka skrin ban load
Ka jingshit jingkhriat %1$s ka la kiew sha ka pud jong ngi kaba %2$s
Ki jingjia jong u bnai ban wan?
Ym don ba download ne app ba lah ban setup

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ka don ka jingbakla %1$d ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit ia ki %2$s logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap katba dang pynthymmai, peit %2$s ki logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ka la don ka jingbakla %1$d ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s logs na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
Ki don %1$d ki jingbakla ba la lap ha ka file %2$s, peit ia ka file %2$s ba la shem ha %3$s lane peit ia ki %4$s log na ka bynta ki jingtip ba bniah
